case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS ULTIMATE COOKIE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT ULTIMATE COOKIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-01-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ULTIMATE COOKIE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ULTIMATE COOKIE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $560.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT ULTIMATE COOKIE
DO NOT ISSUE W R I T.APPEAL ON FILE
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 22914, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ULTIMATE COOKIE PLTFF'S CLAIM IS DISMISSED FOR LACK OF JURISDICT. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN COSTS. IN SCA# 22914. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
